result:
Here are the middleware files that check user permissions/access in this codebase:

### Primary Permission/Access Middleware

| File | Class/Function | What it checks |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Middleware/apiMonitorMiddleware.php` | `apiMonitorMiddleware` | **Main permission gate.** `enforceAdminUserListingAccess()` checks `MANAGE_USERS` permission via `permissions` and `usersPermissionsMapping` tables. `enforceStoreAccess()` validates the user has access to the requested store(s) via `userStoreMap`. `shouldBypassStoreAccess()` / `getStoreAccessBypassRules()` define exemptions. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/OauthMiddleware.php` | `OauthMiddleware` | OAuth2 token validation — verifies `access_token`, resolves `client_id`, sets chain/store context on the request. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/MyMiddleware.php` | `MyMiddleware` | Token-based auth — checks `access_token` in the OAuth table, validates `isActive`, aborts 403 if unauthorized. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/Authenticate.php` | `Authenticate` | Laravel's standard auth guard — returns 401 if not authenticated. |

### Third-Party / Partner Access

| File | Class/Function | What it checks |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Middleware/thirdPartyToken.php` | `thirdPartyToken` | Validates third-party access tokens, checks `thirdPartyChainID` matches the requested chain, aborts 403 on mismatch. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/partnerAppToken.php` | `partnerAppToken` | Validates partner access tokens from `globalPartnerAccessTokens`. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/verifyMobiquest.php` | `verifyMobiquest` | IP + token verification for Mobiquest integration — returns "don't have permission" on failure. |
| `app/Http/Middleware/UrbanpiperAccess.php` | `UrbanpiperAccess` | Access control for Urbanpiper integration routes. |

### Other Auth-Adjacent Middleware

| File | What it does |
|---|---|
| `app/Http/Middleware/IpRateLimitMiddleware.php` | Rate limiting by IP |
| `app/Http/Middleware/EcomMiddleware.php` | E-commerce route auth |
| `app/Http/Middleware/MerchantMiddleware.php` | Merchant-specific auth |
| `app/Http/Middleware/webMiddleware.php` / `webMiddlewareV2.php` | Web session auth |

The **most critical** one for user permissions is **`apiMonitorMiddleware.php`** — it enforces both permission-based access (`MANAGE_USERS` via `usersPermissionsMapping`) and store-level access control (`userStoreMap`).
